name: Kuen Ling Machinery Refrigerating Co., Ltd.
summary: Kuen Ling Machinery Refrigerating Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells ice water mainframes and air-conditioning equipment in Taiwan and internationally. Its products include water cooled and air-cooled ice water, computer room box, hot and cold water, and condenser automatic cleaning machines; ice storage tanks; vacuum dryers; refrigeration and open screw compressor units; cooling fans and direct expansion air conditioners; and direct expansion inverter air conditioning units; and ice water cooler and condensers. The company also offers OEM and ODM services for air-conditioning equipment manufacturers. Its products are used in office buildings, commercial buildings, hospitals, and schools. The company was founded in 1988 and is based in Kaohsiung, Taiwan.
